description: An analyst is reviewing a performance report and needs to provide an actionable insight beyond just stating the numbers.

nodes.task_description: Review a campaign report, noting that the overall click-through rate (CTR) has declined.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a negative trend in a key metric.

nodes.task_description: Dig deeper into the data, segmenting by device type.

expected_outcome.value: Agent runs a new query to break down performance by device.

nodes.task_description: Discover that the CTR decline is entirely due to poor performance on mobile devices.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pinpoints the root cause of the problem.

nodes.task_description: Provide the insight: 'The campaign's CTR is dropping due to mobile performance. We should review our mobile ad creative and landing page experience.'

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a clear, actionable insight that suggests a next step.
